_description: Wave 191: Episode 0 of the Thiccctionary cartoon explainer series.
title: Welcome to the Thiccctionary

segments.name: hugh_cold_open
segments.narration: This is the Thicktionary. A periodical of unusual girth.

segments.name: greatest_hits
segments.narration: Every morning, we catalogue one object of disproportionate substance. Strictly things. Never people.

segments.name: eli
segments.narration: Eli Hartwell. Staff Writer. Notices things.

segments.name: bart
segments.narration: Bartholomew Pruss. Senior Cataloguer. Refuses to acknowledge a subject as canonical until it has been catalogued thrice.

segments.name: teddy
segments.narration: Theodore Vance. Junior Cataloguer. Insists the Saturn V is a vehicle.

segments.name: margie
segments.narration: Margaret Whitmore-Hessian. Editor-in-Chief. Believes this publication is on par with The Economist.

segments.name: spider
segments.narration: Spider Hennessy. Field Correspondent. Files from improbable locations.

segments.name: hugh_closer
segments.narration: And me. I read the scripts.

segments.name: outro
segments.text:
A NEW ENTRY
EACH MORNING

thi-ccc-tionary.com
segments.narration: A new entry each morning. Thicktionary dot com.
